# Shields.io Badge Reference

Always include shields.io badges directly after the `# Title` heading. Badges give an instant visual summary of the project's tech stack.

## Format

`![Label](https://img.shields.io/badge/Label-Value-color)`

## What to Badge

Pick 3-6 of the most relevant:

- Primary language and version: `![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.11+-blue)`
- Framework: `![Streamlit](https://img.shields.io/badge/UI-Streamlit-FF4B4B)`
- Key library: `![DataFrames](https://img.shields.io/badge/DataFrames-Polars-CD792C)`
- Package manager: `![uv](https://img.shields.io/badge/Packages-uv-DE5FE9)`
- Database: `![PostgreSQL](https://img.shields.io/badge/DB-PostgreSQL-4169E1)`
- Infrastructure: `![Docker](https://img.shields.io/badge/Container-Docker-2496ED)`

## Color Suggestions by Category

| Category       | Technology                          | Color    |
| -------------- | ----------------------------------- | -------- |
| **Languages**  | Python                              | `blue`   |
|                | JavaScript                          | `F7DF1E` |
|                | TypeScript                          | `3178C6` |
|                | Rust                                | `CE412B` |
| **Frameworks** | Streamlit                           | `FF4B4B` |
|                | Next.js                             | `000000` |
|                | _(use the framework's brand color)_ |          |
| **Databases**  | PostgreSQL                          | `4169E1` |
|                | Redis                               | `DC382D` |
|                | MongoDB                             | `47A248` |
| **Tools**      | Docker                              | `2496ED` |
|                | uv                                  | `DE5FE9` |
|                | npm                                 | `CB3837` |

Don't overthink badge colors — pick something reasonable and move on.
